positive: An ethereal, geometric forest landscape viewed at dawn. The scene features stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna forming complex, interconnected patterns. Central to the image is a majestic, abstractly rendered stag with geometric crystalline antlers, surrounded by stylized jungle foliage and glowing root systems. The composition is balanced and highly detailed, featuring strong silhouettes of leaves and branches against a gradient sky of deep indigo merging into soft teal and gold. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau, combining the natural curve of Art Nouveau with the sharp lines and symmetry of Sacred Geometry. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting from the forest floor and the central light source at dawn. Color palette: High-contrast, limited to deep blues, vibrant teal, crystalline white, and earthy greens. Suitable for repeat patterns on apparel. Minimalist yet maximalist composition.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, grainy, ugly, bad anatomy, mutated, noise, excessive detail, asymmetrical, amateur, logos, brands
